name: A Dim Hallway Above the Stairway
description:
You are at the end of the dim hallway.  Below you are some old wooden stairs.
You can see that what's available of the light from the north can not penetrate
the lower floor.  A room is to the west and to the east.  Hanging on the walls
are some torches that look serviceable.

exits.description: You see nothing in the gloom below.
